response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience with strong expertise in multiple languages and frameworks, but his background is heavily skewed towards JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development rather than C++. While he has some C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), it lacks depth in modern C++ practices, STL, multi-threading, and industrial automation-specific technologies like message brokers or IEC 62443. His leadership and architectural skills are evident, but the core C++ competency for this role is insufficient.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with a focus on testability and quality
Proven leadership in open-source projects and mentoring (e.g., GISCollective, Flutter-Asserts)
Experience with low-latency systems and high-performance architectures (Dlang, C++)
concerns: Limited recent and deep C++ experience; most recent C++ work was in 2015
No direct experience with industrial automation, message brokers, or IEC 62443 standards
Lacks hands-on experience with cloud platforms (e.g., Microsoft Azure) or IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP)

key_factors.factor: C++ expertise and modern STL usage
